content.Text:
[Mon 2026-04-20 09:42 PDT] Create a new standalone HTML tool for the BioBots bioprinting platform: "Experiment Risk Assessor" (risk-assessor.html in the docs/ folder).

This is an AUTONOMOUS pre-experiment risk assessment tool. The user configures their planned experiment parameters (cell type, bioink material, printer settings, environmental conditions, timeline) and the tool proactively analyzes risks, identifies potential failure points, suggests mitigations, and gives a go/no-go recommendation with confidence score.

## Key Features:
1. **Experiment Configuration Panel** - Form inputs for: cell type (dropdown: HeLa, MSC, iPSC, Chondrocyte, Hepatocyte, Fibroblast, Keratinocyte, Endothelial), bioink material (dropdown: Alginate, GelMA, Collagen, PEGDA, Silk Fibroin, Hyaluronic Acid, Fibrin, Matrigel), print temperature (slider 15-45°C), print pressure (slider 10-200 kPa), nozzle diameter (dropdown: 100µm, 200µm, 300µm, 400µm, 500µm), layer height (slider 50-500µm), crosslinking method (UV, Ionic, Thermal, Enzymatic), target viability (slider 50-100%), experiment duration (1-30 days)
2. **Autonomous Risk Engine** - When user clicks "Assess Risks", the engine automatically checks ~15 risk rules including: temperature compatibility (cell type vs print temp), material-cell compatibility, pressure vs cell viability, nozzle clogging risk (diameter vs material viscosity), crosslinking compatibility, layer height vs structural integrity, duration vs nutrient diffusion limits, contamination risk based on duration, shear stress from nozzle/pressure combo, UV exposure risk for UV crosslinking, thermal shock risk
3. **Risk Dashboard** - Shows: overall risk score (0-100, color-coded gauge with Canvas arc), go/no-go recommendation with confidence %, categorized risk findings (Critical/High/Medium/Low) each with icon, description, and specific mitigation suggestion
4. **Risk Heatmap** - Canvas-based matrix showing risk categories vs severity as colored cells
5. **Mitigation Planner** - Auto-generated ordered list of recommended actions with effort estimates (quick fix / moderate / significant)
6. **Comparison Mode** - Save up to 3 experiment configs and compare risk profiles side by side
7. **Export** - JSON export of full risk assessment report

## Style:
Use the same dark theme as other BioBots tools:
--bg: #0f172a; --surface: #1e293b; --border: #334155; --text: #e2e8f0; --muted: #94a3b8; --accent: #3b82f6;

Single self-contained HTML file, no external dependencies. Use Canvas for the gauge and heatmap. Make it look professional.

## Also:
- Add a link to risk-assessor.html in docs/index.html in the tools navigation/listing section (look for the pattern of how other tools are linked)
- Update docs/sitemap.xml to include the new page

Do NOT create any branches or PRs. Just make changes on the current branch.
